summary: Successfully tested both bug fixes in GuessIt football prediction app. Quick Predict modal auto-closes after prediction with 'Saving...' feedback, and mobile layout (375px) displays all buttons properly without clipping.
passed_tests: Quick Predict modal opens successfully when clicking PREDICT MATCH button
Quick Predict '1' button click shows 'Saving...' feedback for 500ms then auto-closes modal (desktop)
Quick Predict '2' button click shows 'Saving...' feedback for 500ms then auto-closes modal (mobile)
All Quick Predict buttons (1, X, 2) are fully visible on mobile 375px width without clipping
Mobile modal uses correct w-[92vw] width and fits properly on screen
Quick Predict buttons use grid-cols-3 layout with proper spacing on mobile
Advanced Options modal tabs are properly visible on mobile (4 out of 5 tabs visible)
Prediction confirmation appears after modal closes ('You predicted: Away Win (2)')
Login functionality works correctly with provided credentials
Desktop modal layout and functionality works as expected
